# MDE v1.3.6

## Features

* No new end-user features in this release.

## Bug Fixes

* Keeps the autosave cursor fix from v1.3.5.

## Breaking Changes

* None.

## Maintenance

* Fixed the release workflow to prefer `.github/release-notes/vX.Y.Z.md` when creating or restoring GitHub Release notes.
* Archived the completed autosave cursor bug document under `docs/bugs/done`.

## Verification

* `npm run lint`
* `npm run typecheck`
* `npm run test:unit`
* `npm run test:integration`
* `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/release.yml"); puts "release.yml OK"'`

## Artifacts

* macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.3.6-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.3.6-mac-arm64.zip`
* macOS Intel: `MDE-1.3.6-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.3.6-mac-x64.zip`
* Windows x64: `MDE-1.3.6-win-x64.exe`
* Update metadata: `latest-mac.yml`, `latest.yml`

macOS artifacts remain unsigned when Apple Developer ID signing secrets are not configured; MDE downloads and opens the DMG so users can drag the app into Applications.
